ending_1_coma.name: Coma Wake
ending_1_coma.result: The lamp's strange energy triggers a memory - you were in a coma all along. The bus was your mind's way of coping. You wake up in a hospital bed, the timeloop finally broken.

ending_2_dark_city.name: Dark City
ending_2_dark_city.description: Bus arrives in dark city, loop breaks
ending_2_dark_city.result: The lamp shatters with an impossible sound. The bus doesn't reset - it keeps driving. Through the windows, you see a dark, endless city. The driver finally speaks: 'We're here.' The loop is broken, but into what?

ending_3_give_up.name: Give Up
ending_3_give_up.result: Following the kid's instructions, you end your own existence within the loop. But instead of resetting, everything goes dark. Then - silence. The loop is truly over. Whether you wanted this or not... it's done.
